name: education_biometric_enrollment_backlog_southport_jus_mer
premise: A ransomware event locked report cards; seniors need transcripts for scholarship deadlines this week. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education biometric enrollment backlog southport jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is justice versus mercy under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Arjun Reed
agents.identity: I am Arjun Reed, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Okoye
agents.identity: I am Inez Okoye, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with mercy.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to mercy to preserve operational justice.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Arjun Reed must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Arjun Reed do?
